body.title: agent_datacenter: extract IgorBase/AgentBase into agent_datacenter.device, Igor imports back
body.result: BaseDevice already lives in agent_datacenter/device.py; IgorBase extraction is a TheIgors-side import change — deferred until Igor comes back up
body.description:
**Pre-approved by Akien 2026-04-27 for restructuring IgorBase/AgentBase. Reason: base class architecturally belongs in agent_datacenter (it IS the device contract); Igor is one consumer. HIGH-inertia label is for Igor autonomous loop — not a human/CC restriction. Haiku can drive.**

Refactor IgorBase and its parent AgentBase to live in agent_datacenter, not inside Igor. Igor imports back. No behavior change — structural move only.

Problem: IgorBase is Igor's base class, but the whole point of agent_datacenter is that this contract is shared across all agents. It can't live inside Igor if Igor is one of many implementors.

Proposed shape:
1. Inventory: `git grep 'IgorBase\|AgentBase' ~/TheIgors/wild_igor/` — record all import sites (expected: ~30 subclasses in cognition/, brainstem/, memory/, tools/)
2. Move lab/utility_closet/agent_base.py → agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/device.py as BaseDevice (merged with existing abstract BaseDevice stub from T-adc-base-device-contract)
3. Update wild_igor/igor/igor_base.py: from agent_datacenter.device import BaseDevice, get_logger; class IgorBase(BaseDevice): (thin wrapper — adds log_dir and get_timer())
4. All subclass import paths unchanged — they still import from wild_igor.igor.igor_base; only igor_base.py itself changes its parent import
5. Install agent_datacenter as editable dep in TheIgors venv: pip install -e ~/dev/src/agent_datacenter
6. pytest tests/ must pass before and after
7. lab/utility_closet/agent_base.py: keep as re-export shim pointing to agent_datacenter (backward compat for non-Igor uses)

Affected files:
- ~/dev/src/agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/device.py (receive AgentBase content)
- ~/TheIgors/wild_igor/igor/igor_base.py (update parent import to agent_datacenter.device)
- ~/TheIgors/lab/utility_closet/agent_base.py (re-export shim)
- ~/TheIgors/wild_igor/requirements.txt (add agent_datacenter dep)

Design rules:
- oop-first: IgorBase stays as a thin subclass of BaseDevice; all subclasses unchanged
- no-sqlite: not applicable
- docs-in-code: igor_base.py module docstring updated to note the import now comes from agent_datacenter

Scope boundary:
IN: structural move of AgentBase → agent_datacenter.device; IgorBase import update; venv dep; backward compat shim
OUT: any behavior changes; updating all ~30 subclass import paths (they all go through igor_base, not agent_base)

Test plan:
- pytest ~/TheIgors/tests/ passes identically before the move
- pip install -e agent_datacenter; pytest ~/TheIgors/tests/ passes identically after
- from agent_datacenter.device import BaseDevice succeeds
- from wild_igor.igor.igor_base import IgorBase still works (backward compat)
